description: You are the 2nd Assistant Director for the film 'The Midnight Echo'. It is Day 14 of production. Create a professional one-page Daily Call Sheet for tomorrow's shoot in Apache OpenOffice Writer using the production logistics from /home/ga/Documents/production_data.json and the logo from /home/ga/Documents/production_logo.png. The document must feature a header with the Film Title, 'Day 14 of 24', and the General Crew Call time. Include a 'Shooting Schedule' table listing Scene #, Description, Day/Night, Pages, and Cast IDs, as well as a 'Cast' table listing Character, Actor, Pickup Time, H/M Time, and Set Call Time. Ensure all times match the source data exactly. Include the weather forecast and nearest hospital information at the bottom. Save the document as /home/ga/Documents/Call_Sheet_Day_14.odt.
